# Mira AI

> Mira is an AI assistant living natively inside Telegram. It combines agentic infrastructure, private compute, and social memory to deliver a truly personal AI experience — right in your chats, groups, and channels.

Mira is built on The Open Platform and runs on GPT (normal mode) or Qwen3-32B via the Cocoon confidential compute network (private mode). It supports integrations with 500+ apps, a built-in TON wallet, image/video/voice generation, and long-term memory.

## Docs

- [Overview](https://mira.tg/docs): What Mira is and why it exists
- [Quickstart](https://mira.tg/docs/quickstart): How to start using Mira in Telegram

## Core

- [Agentic Infrastructure](https://mira.tg/docs/core/agentic-infrastructure): How Mira executes multi-step tasks across apps
- [Private Mode](https://mira.tg/docs/core/private-mode): Confidential compute via Cocoon network and TEE nodes
- [Social Memory](https://mira.tg/docs/core/social-memory): How Mira remembers users across conversations

## Features

- [Chat](https://mira.tg/docs/features/chat): Conversational AI in Telegram
- [Images](https://mira.tg/docs/features/images): Image generation and editing
- [Voice](https://mira.tg/docs/features/voice): Voice messages, TTS, and STT
- [Video](https://mira.tg/docs/features/video): Video generation and video notes
- [Integrations](https://mira.tg/docs/features/integrations): 500+ app connections via Composio
- [Wallet](https://mira.tg/docs/features/wallet): Built-in TON blockchain wallet
- [Memory](https://mira.tg/docs/features/memory): Long-term and working memory system

## Product

- [Features Overview](https://mira.tg/docs/product/features): Full feature list
- [Who It's For](https://mira.tg/docs/product/for-who): Use cases and target audience

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/DariaYakovleva/mira-wiki): Source of this documentation
